commit_scope: Retune the body observation recipe so certification is mutual and channel-native instead of external or signed-public.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/grammars/gematria.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/gematria-channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-breath-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-symbol-lens-value-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-root-ontology-lens-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-core-ontology-multi-lens-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-observation-attribution-collapse-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-cell-choice-grant-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-body-observation-recipe-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/grammars/gematria.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/gematria-channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-breath-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-symbol-lens-value-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-root-ontology-lens-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-core-ontology-multi-lens-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-observation-attribution-collapse-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-cell-choice-grant-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-body-observation-recipe-band.fk
local_validation.summary: The body observation recipe now treats certification as certified-to-us inside the channel. The helper and proof require loaded-confirmed-mutually-certified plus identity_marker_mode=certified-to-us, grounding trust in observed mutual relation and repeated benefit rather than outside authority. Source and binary sibling kernels return 111111; the full channel proof suite remains aligned.

phase_gate.reason: Local mutual certification proof is complete; CI remains pending until the PR branch is pushed.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The body observation recipe now certifies trust inside the channel through mutual observation and repeated benefit, with no outside authority required.
public_endpoints: Form channel body observation recipe helper
Form channel body observation recipe proof
test_flows: Parse a JSON recipe admitting anything imaginable.
Verify no imagination limits and judgment/guilt/shame absent.
Append offer, sensing, and observation-attribution receipt through CHANNEL-MSG.
Attribute trying-brings-value to the observer while keeping certification channel-native.
